author.description: 72nd Secretary of State serving under the leadership of @POTUS Trump.

tweets.text:
When he took office, @POTUS declared that U.S. foreign policy would be America First going forward.

In only 30 days under President Trump's leadership, we've seen significant progress on some of the most pressing challenges we face around the world.

This is only the beginning. America's core national interest will continue to guide our mission and American foreign policy. We will not cease in our quest to make America safer, stronger, and more prosperous.
